metadata.title: Temporal pixel-masking privacy display pipeline
notes: Fresh full-scene node reauthoring after round-two rendered-text review.
Every multiword label now uses a dedicated fixed single-line text zone.
Camera is a vector camera motif instead of text inside a narrow box.
Color is redundant with solid/dashed routes, explicit labels, and panel geometry.

required_edge_motifs: single navy lane then green/orange outcomes

text_layout_facts: icons and labels occupy separate rows

arrow_plan.source_fact: Input display flows to the security module.
Security module flows to complementary masks.
Optional tag connects down to GPU.
Fork routes upward to the eye.
Fork routes downward to the camera.
Frame row produces a sparse fragment.
